view.title: Validate explicit UC need #1
view.subtitle: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for a simple online booking page is satisfied as evidenced by the successful booking process.

blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 1 completed
blocks.message: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for a simple online booking page is satisfied as evidenced by the successful booking process.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step to validate the requirement of a 'Simple online booking page' is supported by the evidence of customer bookings. Specifically, the 'customer-book-primary' step shows that a customer successfully booked an appointment, confirming the existence of a functional booking page. Additionally, the linked use case outlines the necessary features of the booking process, which are reflected in the evidence provided.
